benefits.description: Felt like 25 again per article title; Epitalon/Thymalin combo felt more 'rounded' and pronounced than either alone or BPC alone
GHK-Cu topical worked very well for the skin
Selank and Semax used regularly as nootropic stack; described as 'perfect nootropic stack'
Thymalin and Epitalon used partly for immune system effects

side_effects.description: GHK-Cu injectable formed a lump under skin that remained for days, itched and hurt until fully absorbed regardless of injection site or volume
GHK-Cu nasal spray burned and dried mucus membranes
Headaches when dosing Selank/Semax too much in a row; resolved by cycling

protocol_notes: Combined multiple peptides into one syringe via backfill to minimize injections. BPC dose was intentionally high (1mg/day) to confirm efficacy; now dosing lower. Tried GHK-Cu injectable, nasal spray, and oral tablets before settling on topical dropper bottle. Selank and Semax used nasally for 6 months in combination with monolaurin, alternating daily with liquid psilocybin microdose. Was off-cycle from the main peptide stack at time of post, planning new cycle in new year. Noted being particularly sensitive to peptide effects.
